summary_text: PLAN-20260705-0001 is now completed. The completion followed WARR-20260705-0002, which certified fulfillment of the read-only L0 candidate diagnostics scope. Commit 1a5c777 updated the PLAN status from proposed to completed, updated next_action to state that no further action remains for this PLAN, regenerated SELF_MODEL.json, and updated self-model tests. SELF_MODEL.json now reports plan_counts.completed = 1, open_plans = [], admitted_plans = [PLAN-20260705-0001], and warrant_counts.supported = 2. Post-commit audit reported ok true and content current.
